response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or geospatial data pipelines — critical requirements for the role. Their C++ exposure is limited to academic/NI LabWindows work over a decade ago, and their GIS work uses DLang and Node.js, not the required stack. No evidence of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or routing tile optimization.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial project experience with GISCollective
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Demonstrated leadership in testing, CI/CD, and developer education
concerns: No recent or commercial C++/Rust experience in routing or geospatial pipelines
Lacks demonstrated expertise in distributed systems, consistency, or low-latency data processing
Primary tools (DLang, Node.js, TypeScript) do not align with core tech stack requirements
